label_policy.canonical: Use hierarchy.canonical_label when present. tax_codes/reaction_names contain one item.
label_policy.multi_label: For multi-label named-reaction aliases, keep all hierarchy.labels in tax_codes/reaction_names; tax_code/reaction_name are the first label for compatibility.
label_policy.hierarchy_levels: For v7 hierarchy records, tax_code is POLAR.level_1.level_2.level_3 and entry_code preserves the specific mapped-reaction level_4 path.
